package.name: perceptbot_behaviors
package.description: AIR26 workshop 05 — the switchable behaviours for the perception rover. Keeps the three project-02 obstacle behaviours (pub-sub, service+action) and adds three vision behaviours: light-seek (light_level), colour-seek (mean_color) and ArUco search+approach (ApproachMarker action). Switch any time via /set_behavior.
